channel.title: BN — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on BN (Brookfield Corp) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: ADDED BN (+50%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) added BN in Q4 2025 · 9.8% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stephen Mandel)

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED BN (+45%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added BN in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Chuck Akre: ADDED BN (+40%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) added BN in Q4 2025 · 13.5% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chuck Akre)

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED BN (+33%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) added BN in Q4 2025 · 3.9% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Lee Ainslie)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED BN (-21%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed BN in Q4 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Bill Ackman: ADDED BN (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) added BN in Q4 2025 · 10.4% of portfolio. Building Brookfield position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Ackman)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED BN (+7%) · Q4 2025
